review_text:
We had the pleasure of staying in one of the Safari Tents for 2 nights recently. The tents are great, air con in 2 rooms, makes it nice and cosy. The furniture and fittings are great, the bathroom is wonderful. Service from reception was warm and friendly. A lovely tidy holiday park too.

We would definitely stay again.
Stayed on a premium site for the weekend. What a fantastic park. Big sites, easy to get the van into. Super clean park, good amenities. Will definitely return.

Had the safari tent, pretty cool .
Mind you the buffeting from the wind woke me up a few times but hey it's a giant house tent 😄 🤣
Cabins were full .we stayed in our caravan. Plenty of space, lovely amenities and small but nice pool.

Clean, large drive thru sites, lovely pool area with clean tidy facilities and ammenities. Have stayed a few times all with a good experience. Definitely will stay again.
Follow our travels @travellingozourway
Bob and Jennifer

We spent the weekend at Sails Holiday Park with a big group of family (there were loads of us!) and had such a great time. The location is fantastic – close to shops and everything you need. The park is really well maintained, and we had a mix of cabins and caravan sites which worked perfectly for our group. The cabins are modern, clean and very well looked after, and the pool was a big hit with everyone. The staff were friendly and welcoming, which made the stay even better. We loved it so much that we’ve already rebooked for our next family getaway!
A bit tired and needed some TLC  lovely staff.

We had a premium powered site for the weekend and the park grounds, and amenities were immaculately clean. Soo nice and quiet. Great facilities and easy access to cafes, supermarkets etc nearby. Big sites, nice pool and all you could need in a park.

Nice park shame about the manager and gardener .
Customer service isn't there priority at all and when told we are doing a review answer was I don't care .
We travel Australia and stay at plenty of sites and will never stay at that park again .
I could go on how un accommodating they were but don't want to waste anymore time of these people .
Many caravan and camping exhibitors have also pulled out .
Maybe if it was there own business they would take more interest in there paid guests at $80 pet night powered site .

From the moment you arrive, it’s clear this caravan park is something special. The staff go above and beyond every single day—friendly, attentive, and genuinely invested in making sure every guest feels welcome.

The location is another standout. Perfectly positioned, it offers the ideal balance of convenience and natural beauty.

Don’t just take our word for it, our customers at Caravan Spares and Repairs, can’t stop raving about their stays, the feedback has been overwhelmingly positive, and a growing number are returning year after year.

If you’re looking for a caravan park that delivers exceptional service, a prime location, and an experience people can’t stop talking about, this is the place.
Very nice park. Lovely caravan spots, some concrete pad, some drive thru. Limited shade. Nice location. Reception staff lovely. Can be a bit pricey in school holidays.

Brilliant lil park. Good size sites, well kept, friendly staff. Nice locale too. Easy walk to everything. Close to the water and a club. Only problem is the greed of the lease holders. In 6 months the price rose basically every week. Over $100 bucks since my first weekly stop. Yeah, nah.

We stayed at this caravan park for two nights and it was absolutely awesome. The park is very well thought out, immaculately clean, and the grounds are beautifully maintained. The amenities were spotless, the sites were large and spacious, and there were plenty of shady areas throughout the park.

Waking up to birds chirping in the morning was just beautiful, and the park itself was incredibly quiet and peaceful. The location is perfect close to the lake and only minutes from nearby shopping centres and restaurants, which made everything so convenient.

We’ve travelled around quite a bit and can honestly say this is one of the best parks we’ve stayed at. We’re down in Newcastle nearly every month, and after staying here, this will definitely be our go to park from now on. We used to stay at the park on the other side of Newcastle, but we won’t be going back.

There’s honestly not one thing we can fault — it was just perfect.  A hidden gem!
Highly recommend.
Great place..nice and quiet..very clean
Had a caravan site. Extremely clean. Shady areas near the pool. Great kitchen dining aircon near pool. Facilities clean and tidy. .near to shops and the lake etc

This park is a hidden gem which we lucky enough to find. The amenities are some of the best we have seen and it is in walking distance to so much in the area. It is clean, quiet and the staff were wonderful.
Well planned spaces, very clean and tidy. Front of office so welcoming and helpful.
Clean friendly beautiful park and staff are always helpful.

I like the park it's close to the river. We had a premium site large plenty of room. The park is well maintained and the staff are friendly. The amenities are clean with large showers with a good hot flow.
The camp kitchen is lovely as is the BBQ area with tables and shelter.
There's a small pool although a family with a couple of kids staying in the cabins used the pool letting their kids in the water with no nappies even though they were both in nappies. That was a little off putting.
One of our favourite CPs! Such lovely management who keep the grounds immaculate. Top location too.
Great park but overpriced!!!

Fantastic park!  Very well laid out, lots of thought has gone into the planning. Premium sites were double slab with a concrete drive long enough for you to park out the front.
Amenities were spotless, up there with the cleanest we've seen.
It looks a bit poky from the street but once inside it was fine.
We'll definitely stay there again.

Not long ago we limped(our car was experiencing transmission problems) into this wonderful caravan park. The rain was pouring down, we had not been able to get into another park (because of flooding) but at reception Sue and Colin opened their hearts to us and found a spot in the park (which ended up being nearly 2 weeks) until our car was back on the road.  Needless to say it was a beautiful place to stay, close to the shops (10-15mins to Woolies and Coles) beautiful scenic spots and walks with a great club called "Belmont 16s sailing club" nearby which provided amazing views of Lake Macquarie,delicious meals and entertainment. The park facilities (toilets, showers,pool, laundry,lawns BBQ area and community kitchen were kept spotless..the caravan sites were quite large on lawn or concrete...a lovely place to stay..can thoroughly recommend it!And Sue's comment,"we like to treat people as we'd like to be treated" sums up our experience perfectly!..

The park is well laid out with majority of permanent sites.
The caravan sites are large and have plenty of room.
The amenities are great with incredible showers that are spotlessly clean.
A number of sites had their furry friend yet it was quiet. There was a van with small children that was more noisy than any of the dogs.
We only stayed for 2 nights but wish me had more time,

Do not stay at this park if you’re under 40, have children or a dog. The old bloke managing the park will ruin your holiday as he did ours. Our kids couldn’t leave our slab without him carrying on like a pork chop, or dog couldn’t leave our van without the same carry on. Spoke with multiple people here with kids and dogs who all had similar interactions with him. Lake mac holiday parks have let themselves down massively letting this bloke out to interact with the public without supervision. If i could give this place less than 1 star i would, based solely on him.

Stayed for 5 nights while my father had surgery. We were greeted on arrival by a very friendly staff member. The cabin we stayed in was excellent. Huge open kitchen living room. Two bedrooms, both with double beds. Bathroom was a but on the small side. Price per night was reasonable. I would definitely stay here again.

The park is well maintained amenities are lovely and clean.
The Managers Sue and Colin are two of the nicest people we have meet in all our caravan travels.
In a tent so came rate the rooms
Great help from the staff when needed. Clean amenities. Will be back.
I stayed a week and it's a Very Good holiday park especially if you want to walk around, everything needed is in walking distance.

Firstly 5 stars for answering your phone after hours. You guys were the only place to answer,  not only did you put us on a powered sites for the night you lent us a power cord to keep our lights on aswell.
Your after hour service was so appreciated, you will definitely see us back in the future.
Beautiful park and Beautiful hosts

What a fabulous place to stay...do nothing or do it all. Great shopping nearby, cafes, restaurants all within walking distance.  The lake offers peace and tranquillity.  Lovely accommodation, clean and beautifully maintained.  Sue...you're a gem. Thank you

Came to stay in a cabin for the weekend we both had a fantastic time .We arrived to a warm friendly welcome by the staff a beautiful place to stay . although two days we had a bit of heavy rain, we were still able to make the most of our small break and enjoyed going up to the local 16f  skiff club for drinks and a meal would definitely recommend sales holiday park for a place to stay on the beautiful Lake Macquarie look forward to visiting again thanks Jenelle

The lady at check in was so happy and welcoming setting a lovely tone for the stay - rare to get such good customer service nowadays. We just had a short stay but found lots to do. It was particularly nice looking out over the water with a drink and snack for sunset. Only problem - which is not the holiday park’s problem at all, was the heavy smoker in the van next to us who ruined our time in the van. I know smokers have a right to smoke but some consideration to others’ enjoyment would be good.

What can I say. Absolutely fantastic caravan park and the awesome concrete slabs for large Caravans, motorhomes and vehicles. Perfect set up for the awnings and to enjoy outdoor living.  Power, water and drainage was impressive. Perfect location near Lake Macquarie. Shops, clubs. For bike riding, walking. Love the swimming pool, BBQ area and kitchen. Ablution block, laundry, pet bath and dump point very easy access and clean. The grounds and gardens fabulous. So quiet, bird life extraordinary.  Wonderful to share with friends. The office staff so friendly and helpful. Nothing was a problem. Thank you, I'll definitely be back and highly recommend this park. 👌 Lyn

What a Wonderful experience…
We stayed early January for 2 nights travelling with our fur baby. We booked the pet friendly cabin. It was perfect. It had its own fenced area and a doggie door. Perfect for our English Staffy.
Special mention, Sue at reception was absolutely fabulous so friendly & helpful.
This holiday park is well maintained lovely gardens and grass areas. You won’t be disappointed… We will definitely stay again.

We can’t fault this park, always clean and tidy. Great location, sites are large and well maintained.
We will be back
Clean and comfortable.  The staff were great and very accommodating.  Highly recommended

We definitely will visit again !
Sue and her staff go above and beyond !!

Fantastic cabin incredibly good conditions.
I have just a couple of issues for the disabled and young.
Beds are too high off floor.
Need a duller dimmer night light for bathroom.
The automatic front door pressure switch needs to be reduced to save fingers.
Some tutoring should be included in the use of the advanced automatic accessories.
Please this doesnt detract from the comfort we felt and my 93 yr old mum still managed ok.

We were travelling up from Victoria with a large trailer with a boat on it. We rang up late in the day wanting to stay that night and spoke to the manager, can’t remember his name. He was lovely and went out of his way to find us an easy parking spot to park the car and boat. We stayed in a two bedroom cabin and it was lovely, nice and clean with comfy beds. Short walk to places to eat and amazing sunsets at the beach.
Clean, safe and warm reception.
Great neat park.
Nice neat park. Cement slab sites are the best

Just returned from six nights at Sails (van site 308).  As we were catching up with family we were given a spot very near their site.  The staff were wonderful from booking, to arrival and departure. Pet friendly (we had our cocker with us) and there is a cabin with a little enclosed yard for people with no van but a fur baby.  Smallish park but VERY well kept, clean toilets/showers & laundry - nice pool. Good size camp kitchen & nice BBQ area and the Wifi worked great!.  Close walk to water front, sea pool, cafes, clubs. Woolies, Coles & Aldi within walking distance or a short drive. Next time I would book a premium slab site - just in case - as it rained quite a bit while we were there.  Thanks so much for a relaxing stay. Best Wishes

I find Sails Caravan Park, a very pleasing experience, staff are very friendly and helpful the grounds are well maintained, the new additions ( Clamping Cabins, and multiple room cabins),certainly enhances the parks capability, along with the new disabled facilities..
All in all a very pleasant place to stay.
Richard Dray

I have stayed at Sails Holiday Park (caravan site) a number of occasions and have found each time to be a positive experience.  It’s quiet, the amenities are clean, the new slab sites are great and the staff are very friendly and helpful. Would definitely recommend.
Great caravan park. Neat and tidy. Close to the lake and lovely walks.

We can't rate the rooms (as we didnt hire a cabin) We stayed only 1 night in car (last minute) early May 2024 . Staff were helpful to get us a spot to pull in with our car, and have a safe night sleep (in car) on a concrete slab! It was appreciated due to rain that night (and not needing to park on grass). We paid $44 for use of the park services, shower, toilets etc. A little expensive for a 'virtual tent' site ',  but we were just grateful to lay down our heads safely! And so thankful for the hospitality we did get (allowing us to sleep in the car with our dogs), we were very thankful! Its a very clean and comfotable park. Seems to have some friendly permanate residents who didn't mind our small intrusion overnight. Our dogs are lapdogs and were well behaved, so everyone slept all night peacefully. It seems like a nice park overall. Would return here again.
Close to beach large park with playground and swimming pool. Plenty of clean toilets, showers, and clothes line space. Close to the village.
Excellent holiday park, very clean & tidy, a credit to management and staff that maintain this great park
We had an overnight stop here. Customer service was great. Drive through site was fabulous and easy - not super wide and spacious but was still good. Neat little park with good roads / foot paths etc
Lovely small caravan park, well maintained, great pool and camp kitchen, short walk to shops and club
Great family friendly location. If you have pets, they are welcome, no problems. Nice place to get away.
Rude male manager. In the wrong job.
One word Amazing, from the first phone call to driving out ✌️✌️✌️ Scotty & Rose…

ABSOLUTELY AMAZING!!! We were travelling from Brisbane to Melbourne and needed a spot last minute for our 12 mtr set up. We called them and they had a powered spot that was more than accommodating for our needs. The staff were above 5 star. Super friendly and couldnt be more helpful. Amenities and park were so clean and beautiful. Definitely recommend. We would be back all the time, if it was closer to Brisbane 😄 Thank you 🥰

Managed to grab a spot at short notice, site and service both sensational!

I was travelling up from Canberra at late notice and needed a spot to fit a larger caravan.  Spoke to reception and they spotted me straight in on a massive grass site with power / water.  Site size is definitely a strong point at Sails!!!

Another advantage was a great amount of visitor parking as well!!!

Amenities were older, but everything was very clean and in good order.

Would happily stay here again!!!
Stayed for the weekend in the new new Safari tents these are absoultely amazing cannot fault them at all will definately stay here again. Park is so clean and quiet.
Had a wonderful time and a comfortable stay and I urge people to stay in the safari tent it is very comfortable 😁😁😁

Spotlessly clean amenities, well maintained lawns and outdoor areas, friendly helpful service
Highly recommend

As a Grey Nomad l found this park one of the best l have come across in my travels! The sites are all spacious, some fully concreted for van/awning and car, others nicely grassed, while others are drive through. The driveways allow a wide turning circle and all sites are level. This location is a short stroll to Lake Mackenzie and a 2 minute drive to Coles and Woolworths.
We had a very quiet and peaceful few nights stay with our pet and would highly recommend it for a stopover.

Such a great park, this is our go to when back in Lake Macquarie visiting our family. Second time here and we’ve booked again for Christmas 👏 Sites are big (for hubby 😉) ammenities are clean, the grounds are kept lovely all in all it’s a big 10/10 from us 😊 Thank you Lisa, Mick, Sue and Col for making our stay here a pleasure 😊

The experience was really nice, they received me during my backpacking experience through Australia and helped me much more than a normal campervan area have to.
Particular thanks to Sue and her husband which showed an enormous kindness in my regards and made this whole experience simply PERFECT! Hope you all the best, Filippo

10/10 recommend this beautiful caravan park. Our most recent stay it was wonderful to see such a commitment to creating inclusive environments for everyone to be able to enjoy this neighbourhood.
The improvements we could see happening around us, including the new glamping tents with ramp access and safe pathways all around was wonderful!
The trades were respectful, starting at later times and finishing early, and park manager was very informative when we asked about what was happening and we cannot wait to come back see once it’s all finished!

Will never stay here again. We were woken up at 7.30 by loud tradies in 4 large trucks offloading a digger right behind us. They proceed to bang crash and dig for the next hour and a half until we left. We weren’t  advised this would be happening when we checked in, nor were we offered a discount or an alternative site. When we spoke to the office this morning they offered us a credit which we declined as we will never stay here again. We’ve never had such poor treatment at a caravan park.

We did not stay in the rooms so i have rated the caravan park instead. Park is extremely well cared for and looked after.The staff are upgrading and looking after the ammenities and the grounds congratulations to all concerned we will return.

We stayed 1 night, what a Gem ; perfect location, walk to club, shops,
Water.
Very friendly permanent residents.
Reception staff nice, helpful.
Showers, toilets clean and spacious.
Clean great position
Not sure what's going on with this park but don't stay here atm. There is so much construction going on. 7am wake ups when you're trying to escape your construction job is awesome 😁

This caravan park was a great find. The powered sites are large and grassy and the communal areas are well equipped and very welcoming. The park is conveniently located not far from the highway but being in a back street it's quiet and peaceful particularly at night. It's within easy walking distance to the water, shops and clubs. The manager Lisa was very friendly and accommodating. Would highly recommend this park.

We are traveling for 5 months and I must say. This is one of the best caravan parks we have visited what made it particularly enjoyable. Was Lisa who runs the park. Sas such a nice person and so helpful with suggestions for things to do around the area, it made our trip very memorable. I cannot say enough about how much we enjoyed our stay at Sails Holiday Park. Shaun of San Francisco California USA
